{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Terrens
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Killers and Kings (novel)|Of Killers and Kings]]
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Terrens]] is a member of the ship's crew.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
